_publications._publicationTitle: Artificial intelligence-based tools for precision diagnosis and treatment of neurofibromatosis type 1 associated peripheral and central glial tumors.

_contextSnippet: Collaborative data platforms (e.g., SYNAPSE, CTF Data Portal) should be leveraged to harmonize datasets and annotation standards.
details: Recommended as a collaborative data platform to harmonize datasets and annotation standards for NF1 AI research
